faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in White Plains typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. Smaller treatments or spot applications start around $800, while whole-house treatments for larger properties or severe infestations can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in White Plains homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows or doors, mud tubes on foundation walls, visible wood damage, and small piles of frass (termite droppings). You may also notice sagging floors, tight-fitting doors or windows, or bubbling paint. If you notice any of these signs in your White Plains property, contact us immediately for a professional inspection.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in White Plains can be completed in one day, typically taking 4-8 hours depending on property size and treatment method. Liquid barrier treatments are usually finished within a day, while bait station installations may require initial setup followed by monitoring visits over several months. We'll provide a specific timeline during your inspection based on your property's unique needs.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment warranties in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on all our termite treatments in White Plains, typically ranging from 1 to 5 years depending on the treatment type. Our warranties include annual inspections and re-treatment if termites return during the coverage period. We stand behind our work and are committed to keeping your White Plains property termite-free long-term.
